landing.metaDescription: Consult best doctors at your nearby location. Book visits, prescriptions, and care online.

patients.heading: For patients
patients.intro: Find verified practitioners, book a visit, chat with your care team, and manage prescriptions—all in one place.

howItWorks.intro: From search to prescriptions, every stage stays on-platform so you waste less time and get clearer next steps.

search.title: Search a Doctor
search.description: Find verified practitioners by specialty, location, or availability and narrow down who fits your needs.

profile.title: Check Doctor Profile
profile.description: Explore detailed profiles, languages, and patient feedback so you can book knowing exactly who you will see.

book.title: Book & Consult Online
book.description: Reserve a slot that works for you, then meet your clinician via secure messaging or video—no crowded waiting rooms.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy
pharmacy.description: When prescribing is appropriate, your clinician routes medications to trusted partner pharmacies you can use for pickup or delivery.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.readMore: Read more on our FAQ page
faq.q1: How Do I Book An Appointment With A Doctor?
faq.a1: Yes, simply visit our website and log in or create an account. Search for a doctor based on specialization, location, or availability & confirm your booking.
faq.q2: Can I Request A Specific Doctor When Booking My Appointment?
faq.a2: Yes. Every booking is tied to the practitioner profile you selected. Use search and filters to find the clinician you prefer before you pick a time.
faq.q3: What Should I Do If I Need To Cancel Or Reschedule My Appointment?
faq.a3: Open Appointments from your patient dashboard as early as possible, then use reschedule or cancel. Policies may vary slightly by clinician—your confirmation email summarizes the timing.
faq.q4: What If I'm Running Late For My Appointment?
faq.a4: Message your clinician through the secure thread linked to your appointment. They will advise whether to join late, switch to messaging, or rebook.
faq.q5: Can I Book Appointments For Family Members Or Dependents?
faq.a5: Where your account allows dependents or linked profiles you can book on their behalf; otherwise register a separate patient profile so each person has accurate medical records.

testimonials.heading: What Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from patients across Nigeria.

t1.quote: MRD Online Clinic made it so easy to find a specialist. I booked, had my consult, and received my prescription — all within the same day.
t1.name: Aisha Ahmad

t2.quote: As a busy professional, being able to consult a doctor without leaving my office is a complete game changer. Highly recommend this platform.
t2.name: Fatima Yusuf

t3.quote: The doctor I was connected with was thorough and professional. I felt like I was in great hands throughout the entire consultation.
t3.name: Kwame Mensah
